# CWE-502 positive: gob decode of untrusted admin action (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-502-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/gob"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type adminAction struct {
	UserID uint
	Grant  string
}

func ApplyPrivilege(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	raw, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	var action adminAction
	_ = gob.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(raw)).Decode(&action)
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", action.Grant, action.UserID)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
